title: Community New Features Webinar (May 24th)

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Join the community on May 24th to learn all about the newest monday.com features. This month the webinar will focus on some great new updates including:

The new monday AI assistant, and AI features!

Workform specific automation recipes.

Improvements to the admin section.

More customization over user profiles.

Plus, monday dev is out of beta!

Please note this webinar is best for more advanced users. Mark your calendars and register here !

Hope to see you all there! 2023-05-24T15:00:00Z

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Kayla, the webinar will be recorded and will be included our Monthly New Features Wrap Up at the end of the month Stay tuned!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Incase you weren’t aware, you can also access the webinars via the monday academy too simply by searching for ‘new features’ -
